description: Generated feed-2-mcp MCP manifest for the FTC's official Press Release RSS feed.

notes: Official FTC RSS feed directory: https://www.ftc.gov/news-events/stay-connected/ftc-rss-feeds (also linked from https://www.ftc.gov/stay-connected/rss).

Selected feed: the general Press Release feed at https://www.ftc.gov/feeds/press-release.xml (confirmed via direct fetch: RSS 2.0, channel title "Press Release Feed", channel link https://www.ftc.gov/), covering all FTC enforcement actions and policy announcements rather than a narrower topic-only feed (e.g. Competition-only or Consumer-Protection-only press release feeds).
Feed items expose standard RSS 2.0 fields (title, link, description, pubDate, dc:creator, guid).
The feed is public; no authentication is required.

network: GET https://www.ftc.gov/feeds/press-release.xml for source retrieval and periodic polling
